channel.title: Tprrt's Blog - Free Software
channel.description: Embedded Linux, Zephyr RTOS, open-source hardware, Linux gaming, retro gaming, and competitive fitness

item.title: Capitole du Libre 2026: the CFP is open
item.description: The Call for Proposals for Capitole du Libre 2026 is now open. If you have something to share about Free Software or Open Source, this is your chance — submissions close on July 20, 2026.
item.dc:creator: tperrot
